Our Services

Professional deck contractor solutions for every need

Deck Construction

Expert deck building for El Paso homes, designed for lasting beauty and enjoyment.

Learn More →

Pergola Construction

Custom pergolas designed to provide shade and beauty in the El Paso sun.

Learn More →

Deck Repair & Restoration

Extending the life of your El Paso deck with expert repairs and restoration services.

Learn More →

Pergola Repair & Maintenance

Keeping your El Paso pergola in top shape with expert repairs and maintenance.

Learn More →

Deck Staining & Sealing

Protecting and beautifying your El Paso deck with professional staining and sealing.

Learn More →

Custom Deck Design

Creating the perfect outdoor living space with custom deck designs tailored for El Paso.

Learn More →
Red Oaks Pergolas

Trusted deck contractor professionals serving El Paso, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
